summary: A local workstation completed a demo app QA pass and is recording the result into a WEAVE runtime ledger.
work_done: The public-safe operator UI sample loaded.
The app has enough context for the runtime to plan the next maintenance step.
capabilities: Runtime can cite the latest QA result.
Runtime can show a blocker summary to the operator.
Runtime can plan the next local-only maintenance command.

decisions.label: Admit QA evidence
decisions.note: The local QA result can be recorded as runtime evidence.

blockers: Production deployment is outside this sync packet.
stop_boundaries: Do not change billing, credentials, or runtime services.
